scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "web,inv,ord,sup,alr" -c "cyan,green,yellow,blue,magenta" "cd apps/web && npm run dev" "cd apps/mcp-inventory && npx wrangler dev --port 8787" "cd apps/mcp-orders && npx wrangler dev --port 8788" "cd apps/mcp-supplier && npx wrangler dev --port 8789" "cd apps/mcp-alerts && npx wrangler dev --port 8790"
